{{Quote|I was supposed to be her chaperone, but the truth is I spent more time in Anchorhead with my own beau than at the farm.|Dama Whitesun Brunk on her sister Beru|<ref name="Tatooine Ghost" />}}
'''Dama Whitesun Brunk''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

==Biography==
She was the younger sister of [[Beru Whitesun Lars/Legends|Beru Whitesun Lars]]. Her brother was [[Haro Whitesun]], and she may have had another sister called [[Coolie]]—though this may have been [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] nickname for Dama herself.

Dama owned and operated the [[Sidi Driss Inn]], a [[Hotel/Legends|hotel]] in [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]], during the early days of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. She assisted [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] in attempting to recover the painting ''[[Killik Twilight]]''.<ref name="Tatooine Ghost" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Dama, you’re too kind. Thank you.|Leia Organa Solo to Dama|<ref name="Tatooine Ghost" />}}
After [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], Dama, like her brother,<ref name="Galaxies" /> hated the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] for [[Death/Legends|killing]] her sister and [[Owen Lars/Legends|brother-in-law]], [[Owen Lars/Legends|Owen Lars]].<ref name="Tatooine Ghost" /> Those close to Dama considered her trustworthy. She had a round face, hair the color of dust, and desert-scrubbed skin.<ref name="Tatooine Ghost" />

==Appearances==
*''[[A New Hope: The Life of Luke Skywalker]]'' {{Ab|A New Hope: The Life of Luke Skywalker (audiobook)}}
